title: Three Men, a Little Girl, a Police Officer and a Dog
overview: Kusuo and his "friends" search for a missing dog. Kusuo discovers the intricacies of online gaming, then the world of adults as his father's stand-in.

title: Build the Most Powerful Deck!
overview: Broken headgear spells trouble for Kusuo's home life. Kaido ropes his friends into a children's card game and loses in more ways than one.

title: New Teacher with an Outstanding Feature
overview: A sincere new teacher's creepy-looking face leads to mishaps and misunderstandings when the class sets out to find a peeping tom.

title: Terrifying! A Disastrous Transfer Student
overview: Toritsuka ropes Kusuo into helping him after a cute transfer student bumbles into their lives. She might be more than Kusuo can handle.

title: Bully Rescue! Mr. Iguchi
overview: Nendo's friends get mistaken for bullies. Kusuo escapes his friends before their plans to have an escape room adventure become reality.

title: Reawakening Saiki Kusuo
overview: Kusuo is now a third-year student living as a normal teenager with no psychic powers. Sort of. But being normal is harder than he thought.
